message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ParticipantFontColor #000000
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorFontColor #000000
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor "消费者" as C
participant "监管消费者服务端" as S
database "db" as DB1
participant "数字人民币" as DCEP
database "DB" as DB2

C -> S : 购买课程
S -> DB1 : 生成订单号并保存
S -> DCEP : 获取付款二维码
S -> C : 返回订单号和付款二维码
C -> DCEP : 支付
S -> DCEP : 轮询查询支付状况

alt [查询到成功支付]
  S -> DB2 : 修改订单状态，划拨
  S -> C : 通知页面跳转
else [到达最大等待时间仍未查询到成功支付]
  S -> DB2 : 修改订单状态为关闭
end
@enduml
